channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ZIMLAB] Zim Laboratories: Mathew Cyriac Acquires 3.39% Stake via Open Market; Elimath Advisors, Elizabeth Mathew, Florintree Trinex LLP Also Acquire Shares
item.description:
Zim Laboratories has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Mathew Cyriac, along with Elimath Advisors Pvt Ltd, Mrs. Elizabeth Mathew, and Florintree Trinex LLP, have acquired shares in Zim Laboratories. The total shareholding of the group has increased by 7.50% since the last disclosure, now amounting to 19.34%. The acquisition was made through open market and preferential allotment. The total equity share capital of the company has increased from Rs. 48,73,58,140/- to Rs. 53,50,03,110/- post acquisition.

  • Mathew Cyriac acquires 3.39% stake in Zim Laboratories via open market
  • Elimath Advisors, Elizabeth Mathew, and Florintree Trinex LLP also acquire shares in Zim Laboratories
  • Total shareholding of the group increases by 7.50%, now at 19.34%
  • Acquisition made through open market and preferential allotment
  • Total equity share capital of the company increases to Rs. 53,50,03,110/- post acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zim Laboratories Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HITKITGLO] Eswara Rao Nandam Acquires Additional 2% Shares in Hit Kit Global Solutions Ltd
item.description:
Eswara Rao Nandam, along with persons acting in concert, has acquired an additional 2% or more shares of Hit Kit Global Solutions Ltd, resulting in a change in the aggregate shareholding. The acquisition was made on 13th March 2026, and the total voting rights of the company remain the same before and after the acquisition. The acquisition was made through market purchase.

  • Eswara Rao Nandam and persons acting in concert have acquired additional 2% or more shares of Hit Kit Global Solutions Ltd
  • The acquisition was made on 13th March 2026
  • The acquisition was made through market purchase
  • The total voting rights of the company remain the same before and after the acquisition
  • Hit Kit Global Solutions Ltd has no promoter

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HIT KIT GLOBAL SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [UNITECH] Unitech Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Approval of Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Unitech Ltd, in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Code of Conduct, has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board meeting for the approval of the financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Unitech Ltd announces closure of trading window for approval of Audited Financial Results
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after declaration of results
  • Board meeting date for approval of results to be intimated later
  • Move in line with SEBI regulations and company's Code of Conduct

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITECH LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [UCIL] Unifinz Capital India Ltd. Approves Allotment of 30,000 NCDs at INR 9,950.14 Each
item.description:
Unifinz Capital India Ltd. announced the outcome of its Finance Committee meeting held on March 18, 2026. The committee approved the allotment of 30,000 listed, rated, senior, secured, transferable, redeemable, non-convertible debentures (NCDs) with a face value of INR 10,000 each, amounting to INR 30,00,00,000 in total. The NCDs will be issued at an issue price of INR 9,950.14 per debenture, which includes accrued interest. The debentures are proposed to be listed on the Wholesale Debt Market segment of BSE Limited. The NCDs will have a tenure of 14 months and 6 days from the deemed date of allotment and will bear a coupon rate of 13% per annum, payable monthly.

  • Unifinz Capital India Ltd. approved the allotment of 30,000 NCDs.
  • The NCDs will be listed on the Wholesale Debt Market segment of BSE Limited.
  • The NCDs have a face value of INR 10,000 each and an issue price of INR 9,950.14.
  • The NCDs will bear a coupon rate of 13% per annum, payable monthly.
  • The NCDs will have a tenure of 14 months and 6 days from the deemed date of allotment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unifinz Capital India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [JSL] JSL Overseas Holding Acquires 0.03% Shares of Jindal Stainless Ltd from Open Market
item.description:
JSL Overseas Holding Ltd, a promoter group of Jindal Stainless Ltd, has acquired 2,69,051 equity shares of Jindal Stainless Ltd from the open market. This represents 0.03% of the total diluted capital of the company. The acquisition was made in two tranches on 13th and 16th March 2026. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remains unchanged at Rs. 1648839176/- divided into 824419588 equity shares of Rs.2/- each, both before and after the acquisition.

  • JSL Overseas Holding Ltd, a promoter group of Jindal Stainless Ltd, has acquired 0.03% shares of the company from the open market.
  • The acquisition was made in two tranches on 13th and 16th March 2026.
  • The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remains unchanged at Rs. 1648839176/- divided into 824419588 equity shares of Rs.2/- each.
  • Jindal Stainless Limited shares are listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STAINLESS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HASTIFIN] Hasti Finance Ltd Appoints Ankit Kumar Jha as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
item.description:
Hasti Finance Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Ankit Kumar Jha as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer (Key Managerial Personnel) of the Company with effect from 18th March, 2026. The decision was made at the Board of Directors' meeting held on Wednesday, 18th March, 2026. The meeting commenced at 11:30 a.m and concluded at 12:05 p.m. The details of the appointment are provided in Annexure A as per the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD /CFD-PoD1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023, and Regulation 30 read with Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI LODR.

  • Hasti Finance Ltd has appointed Mr. Ankit Kumar Jha as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer.
  • The appointment is effective from 18th March, 2026.
  • The decision was made at the Board of Directors' meeting held on 18th March, 2026.
  • The appointment is in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD /CFD-PoD1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023, and Regulation 30 read with Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI LODR.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HASTI FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Arix Capital Acquires 13.97% Stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd via Share Purchase Agreement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Arix Capital Ltd has acquired a 13.97% stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd through a Share Purchase Agreement dated 9th April 2025. The acquisition was made pursuant to the agreement, with the total equity share capital of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd standing at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each, both before and after the acquisition. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company also remains the same at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each.

  • Arix Capital Ltd acquires 13.97% stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd
  • Share Purchase Agreement dated 9th April 2025
  • Equity share capital of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd remains at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each
  • Total diluted share/voting capital of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd remains at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SILVERTUC] Promoter Vipul Haridas Thakkar Acquires 15,300 Equity Shares of Silver Touch Technologies Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Mr. Vipul Haridas Thakkar, Promoter and Managing Director of Silver Touch Technologies Ltd, has acquired 15,300 equity shares of the company. The transactions were conducted on the 16th and 17th of March, 2026, with 6,300 shares purchased on the 16th and 9,000 shares purchased on the 17th. The shares were acquired on the market.

  • Mr. Vipul Haridas Thakkar, Promoter and Managing Director of Silver Touch Technologies Ltd, has acquired 15,300 equity shares of the company.
  • The transactions were conducted on the 16th and 17th of March, 2026.
  • 6,300 shares were purchased on the 16th and 9,000 shares were purchased on the 17th.
  • The shares were acquired on the market.
  • The acquisition represents a significant increase in Mr. Thakkar's holding in the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Silver Touch Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Umesh Vasantlal Modi, Promoter of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, Acquires Shares Worth 27.30%
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Umesh Vasantlal Modi. The disclosure includes the acquisition of 27,35,000 shares, which is 27.30% of the total share capital, by Modi. The acquisition took place through a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated April 09, 2025. The total equity share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Rs 10 each, both before and after the acquisition.

  • Umesh Vasantlal Modi, a Promoter of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, has acquired shares worth 27.30% of the company.
  • The acquisition took place through a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated April 09, 2025.
  • The total equity share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Rs 10 each.
  • The acquisition does not affect the total equity share capital or the total voting rights of the company.
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SRHHYPOLTD] Sree Rayalaseema Hi-Strength Hypo Ltd Submits Report on Special Window for Physical Shares Transfer
item.description:
Sree Rayalaseema Hi-Strength Hypo Ltd has submitted a report on the lodgement and re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares under the special window provided by the SEBI Circular dated 30th January, 2026. The report, submitted by the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, M/s. Aarthi Consultants Private Limited, Hyderabad, provides details on the status of requests received from shareholders as of February, 2026.

  • Sree Rayalaseema Hi-Strength Hypo Ltd has submitted a report on the special window for physical shares transfer
  • The report is in accordance with the SEBI Circular dated 30th January, 2026
  • The status of requests received from shareholders as of February, 2026 is provided in the report
  • The report is submitted by the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, M/s. Aarthi Consultants Private Limited, Hyderabad

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SREE RAYALASEEMA HI-STRENGTH HYPO LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
